title: Samguk Yusa: Wonhyo's Enlightenment
description: The monk Wonhyo drinks from a skull in the night, is enlightened in the morning: all reality is mind.
introduction: The monk Wonhyo drinks from a skull in the night, is enlightened in the morning: all reality is mind.

translation.text: What he had drunk in the night from a golden cup was water from a skull. Mind creates all things.
